option.name: SCRIPT_TEXT
option.value: $created = Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri http://localhost:8080/inventory -ContentType application/json -Body (Get-Content "$PROJECT_DIR$/docs/samples/inventory-report.sample.json" -Raw); $latest = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://localhost:8080/api/reports/latest; [pscustomobject]@{ CreatedId = $created.id; LatestId = $latest.id; Character = $latest.report.characterName } | ConvertTo-Json
